quickStart: Follow the Archon Quests (main story) to unlock regions and features.
Don't spend your Primogems on the standard banner; save them for limited character banners.
Focus on leveling 1-2 main DPS characters early on instead of everyone.
Cook food for healing and buffs if you don't have a dedicated healer yet.
resinManagement: Original Resin caps at 160 and recharges over time (1 every 8 mins).
Use Resin for Ley Line Outcrops (EXP/Mora), Bosses, and Domains.
Save your Fragile Resin until Adventure Rank 45 for guaranteed 5-star artifacts.
Condensed Resin allows you to save Resin for later or get double rewards from domains.
farmingTips: AR 1-35: Focus on character and weapon levels. Don't farm artifacts yet.
AR 35-44: You can start farming some 4-star artifacts if needed, but keep it minimal.
AR 45+: This is when you should farm 5-star artifacts as they are guaranteed.
Always do your Daily Commissions for Primogems and AR EXP.
